name: The Crush
overview: After being pulled into the world of his own teahouse business game, modern-day developer Lin Yuhao awakens as Wei Xiaotang, the only daughter of a powerful merchant family. Thrust into an arranged marriage with Li Zixuan, heir to a rival teahouse, the two start off as reluctant partners. But as they face challenges together in a world of commerce and tradition, their bond deepens.
